channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 53 replies — 155.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-03-07 21:58 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

61942728
>>61942058
Who would've thought 27 cents would be the local top for BAT

the highs get lower

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947372
>>61947296
Spoken like a terminal baggie. That's not rational at all. Make his own stablecoin so he can get raped by American finance? Then pay dividends in BAT so he can get raped again? Dividends for what? Paid to who? Why would a browser company get a banking license and why would they pay dividends instead of charge a fee so they can make a profit for once.

61947466
>>61947166
some gifted TnA in a razor thin bikini

61947742
>>61947258
I got you next post. Light or dark skinned?

>>61947270
I've been selling off a lot of BAT recently. Not at these prices though. I'll probably keep a good amount just because I'm that retarded.

I have other investments, I get a solid salary, and I have several income streams. Does it suck to lose out holding BAT? Sure, but it is what it is.

>>61947466
Like this? If not or you want a different body type, be as specific as you want.

61947792
>>61946916
its something else entirely. its big.

61947892
>>61947792
I'll take the bait for the sake of hopium kek. Even if something big is coming, its likely far too late desu.

>>61947466
Here's another for you.

>>61947278
Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT.

61947959
>>61946916
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
YOUR CONTENT IS AMAZING

61947966
>>61947892
it depends on what that thing is. in this case, i wouldnt say its necessarily too late. i guess we'll see.

61948112
>>61947892
Moar please

61948155
>>61946916
>the perfect ass does not exist

61948157
>>61947966
What can you tell us?

61948171
>>61947892
>Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT

Doesn't feel very based but I'm glad there are at least a few of us suffering together

also, requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls

61948211
>>61948157
Heres a clue without giving it away completely. What did RH just announce?

61948488
>>61947892
>>61947742
Based thanks very much as always TP. Keep up the good work.

61948551
>tfw thotposter leaves the thread

pack it in, show's over. See you all next week

61948607
>>6194789
Lost
>>61948551
Tp has been super active lately, xhe will post later today most likely

61948610
>>61947892
Lost

61948617
>>61948607
>xhe will post later today most likely

Ok, but I want more thots right now.

61948640
>>61948617
Good point. tp was posting some gold earlier.

61948750
>>61947107
God damn. Didn’t think anyone that far back would still be around.

61948758
>>61947107
Forgot about this image lol

61949100
>>61948211
Robinhood Social?

61949163
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please continue

61949509
>>61949100
No. Come on lol.

61949527
>>61949509
A credit card

61949557
>>61949527
close enough

61949568
>>61949557
Why would a Brave card matter. Nobody would ever want one

61949576
>>61946916
>>61947061
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please just dump webms on cooldown just one time 50 straight posts minimum

61949586
>>61949568
take a deep breath. youre a big boy, you can figure it out from here.

61949620
>>61949586
Passively earning BAT via purchases with the card or something?

61949679
>>61949620
yea, there are a few options here, which are non-mutually exclusive

item.title: if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come: >no preppers >no panicia… — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come: >no preppers >no panicia…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-07 22:16 UTC

OP

if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come:
>no preppers
>no panicians/doomsayers on the streets
>there is still toilet paper on the supermarket shelves
>commodities are pretty much up across the board (except from orange juice) but food prices remain more or less the same (the muh fertilizers thing, maybe every single
supermarket is just stocked up for weeks?)
>fuel is up a little bit and that's it
I know, the stonk market and the normies have no correlation, but at least there should be 1 person freaking out over ww3 or some bullshit going on with MSM, right? Am i missing something? Have you seen any preppers or panicians?

Early replies (first 3)

61949558
>>61949528
it takes time for things to work their way through the economy. how long did it take for massive inflation to hit after they printed trillions of dollars out of thin air with enhanced unemployment gibs, paycheck protection plan gibs, etc.?

61949573
>>61949558
yeah, that's right, like when the FED was talking about the tariff effects like 6 months after the tariffs were implemented. I'm just surprised i haven't seen a covid tier reaction on the normies freaking out stuff like toilet paper. Or people paranoid about a countrywide power grid shutdown. At least not over here.

61949583
>>61949573
like 80% of the country are barely sentient nigger cattle retards. running out of paper to wipe their fat stinking ass is more easily grasped/understood by their subhuman niggerbrain than something like oil prices driving up the cost of everything.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949601
>>61949528
because the war has no apparent effect on americans and they've been trained like dogs to act numb towards middle east wars
except this one has profound impact on energy prices and is a part of a wider interventionist stance going into a new fed regime
just from a market point of view there are so many things that could go wrong and I think smart people are figuring out in real time that given what has already unfolded it is very easy to see a slide into a worst case scenario from here (market crash, inflation, private credit + AI bubble etc)

61949630
>>61949583
>>61949601
so normies are trained to react to *insert current thing* only when they are told to do so? that's kind of sad

61949633
>>61949601
hopefully the CIA takes care of the problem like they did back in '63

61949634
TikTok brain

I was talking about iran with some girl and she said "wasnt that last week? Who cares?"

It reminds me of pre 9/11 where most people are totally clueless

61949643
>>61949528
Because shit isn't about to his the fan. It's that simple. What, do you think Iran is going to muster up the courage to invade the US or something? You think they'll pull off a 9/11 v2?
The scariest thing they can do is fuck with oil production in the middle east by attacking other people's refineries and make themselves the enemy of the world. Or they can fuck with the supply chain of oil.

Basically none of that affects the US outside of rising oil prices. But that just means we get to profit from selling our own oil, and the citizens don't have to pay for the increase of oil because we have our own reserves, refiners and oil mining operations.
It's literally a win win scenario for the US. It'll kinda suck for some of Europe and Asia.

The only sort of REAL scary thing would be Russia or China stepping in to physically defend Iran. But that's less than a 1% chance.
Otherwise it's a fucking nothingburger of astronomical proportions for most of the western world.

61949650
>>61949643
It's this, plus we print money which flows into crypto

61949651
I normally hate doom and gloom but after the past few months I actually hope it's all falling apart. Fuck this gay earth

61949669
>>61949643
gasoline prices are up about 20% month on month. it's a global market. the president can't prevent US companies from selling on the global market. US oil producers have no legal imperative to offer US businesses and US citizens preferential prices. we also import oil from canada and mexico. they have no incentive to offer preferential prices to US customers.

>The scariest thing they can do is fuck with oil production in the middle east
they can continue to launch drones at refineries. they take years to rebuild.

61949681
>>61949669
you're responding to this news' equivalent of "other countries pay the tariffs" from april of last year
I wouldn't bother

61949692
>>61949681
if the country ever economically collapses from the weight of these retarded kike proxy wars i'm going to collect the spinal cords of subhuman niggers like him.

61949710
>>61949692
sadly chaim and friends will get that pleasure since his kind will be first in line to go defend their heeb colony

61949711
>>61949643
You niggers do understand that goods are transported all over the US and that some of that transport uses oil, right? You understand that means the prices of goods across the board will rise, right?

61949726
>>61949669
Oil is up 40% and gas is up 20%? Gas is literally up 10% around me. Even the little habibi stores are only up 10% and with the stupid little refunds most gas stations offer it's less than 10%.
But, anyway, you're proving the point I'm making with that. If oil is up 40% and gas is only up 20%, that's the very definition of the US citizens not having to pay for the increase. Use your brain.
>they can continue to launch drones at refineries.
Damn. They can blow up the refineries own by the other middle eastern countries? How does that affect the US? We have our own oil refineries.

Use your brain. All these things do is increase the price of oil. And the US has one of the world's largest oil reserves. And the literal largest oil producer in the world is the US.
So again, tell me, how does this hurt us? They're literally making our own oil more expensive, ohh nooo.
Not only that we buy the majority of our oil from Canada and Mexico. So, again. How does this hurt us?

item.title: WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS — 22 replies — 60.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-03-07 21:57 UTC

OP

WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

Early replies (first 3)

61949419
>>61949388
You retard, that means the price of oil is gonna go…. You know what. Go ahead anon. You’re right. I hope you do short oil and gas

61949422
>>61949388
We are still early

61949435
>>61949388
Just bought oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949437
>>61949388
TACO

61949438
>>61949388
Oil is being destroyed and the supply is dropping. It's so over. Opening my shorts.

61949440
>>61949388
>shorting a reverse falling knife

61949441
>>61949435
Olive oil? Canola oil?
You cant buy oil on Saturday

61949442
>>61949388
global warming bros? is this bullish for temperatures?

61949447
The brics, banks and billionaires have been loading up on gold the last 10/15 years, this is why.

61949448
Stack physical oil

61949452
>>61949442
>>/r/eddit

61949468
>>61949441
Heard of eToro, fool!

61949479
>>61949468

61949484
Imma gonna short firefighting equipment, the market oversaturated with combustion.

61949489
>>61949388
I don't believe the hype. It's not 2001 anymore, the Middle East is not the de-facto world supplier of oil. Nowadays there are countless exporters of oil on the field. That's what I see, that's where my money is.
There will surely be real consequences for this debacle. It will not be the oil catastrophe it's being hyped up to be.

61949504
>>61949448
not your barrels not your oil

61949511
>>61949388
Did you short oil thinking Trump was going to TACO? Is that why you need us to join your retarded trade so that we can light our money on fire alongside you?

61949515
>>61949489
it's a global market. also isn't not as simple as oil = oil. there are different grades or types of oil. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_crude_oil_products refineries are built to process certain grades of oil. you can't easily re-tool a refinery to process other grades, it's a massive undertaking that costs a lot of money.

61949516
I put several grand into oil futures yesterday. Keep bombing all Persian Gulf production facilities pls.

61949589
>>61949440
ANTI-GRAVITATIONAL KNIFE

61949595
>>61949489
Gulf is 20% of world supply
Demand is highly inelastic

61949675
>>61949419
>Hello Europe, the price of oil has risen
>Hello Middle East, we definitely want the same amount of oil since we clearly have absurd amounts of money and aren't struggling at all

item.title: Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran. — 11 replies — 44.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran.

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-07 22:18 UTC

OP

Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran. Lost like $2k when the Feb calls expired but now I’m beginning to feel like I won the lotto. Could end up being a life-changing amount of money. Current plan is to hold either until end of this week or next Wednesday. After that I’m considering waiting until the oil markets stabilize and then buying a large amount of SCO.

Thank you retard Monke Drumpf

Early replies (first 3)

61949476
>>61949287
finally..one of us made it

61949578
>>61949287
Nice pamp brother, we're all gonna make it.

61949593
28k is life changing money to you? What part of the third world do you hail from?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949603
>>61949593
Fuck off. Most folks are just getting by. $28k can help someone substantially.

Congrats anon, I've been playing with USO as well this week but I got in later.

61949608
>>61949593
Do the math on what the calls will be worth if WTI hits ~$150-$200 over the next two weeks.

61949624
>>61949603
This is the first time that obsessively following world events is actually paying off for me. I am so tempted to just move whatever I walk away with into SCO once things stabilize, but surely it can’t be that easy

61949654
>>61949287
Trump announces bad news on Friday night so the market won't be rattled, and he announces good news on Sunday before the market opens. He wants oil prices down and he knew what the Iran response would be to the attack before he did it. You might get caught with your pants down tomorrow.

61949690
>>61949654
Possible, but I am willing to be that the oil crisis doesn’t get resolved this week. Much more likely that it deepens.

61949694
>>61949690
*willing to bet

61949717
>>61949690
The US blowing up Iran's oil supply won't help prices come down. Since it's just for their own domestic use, that cuts off their exports since they now need to rely on that source.

61949732
>>61949287
i did the same but with UCO beacuse its atually tracks oil more accurately and i lost because trump kept delayng the attacks like a bitch

keep crawling lil buddy, we ALL believe in you

item.title: Post your weekend positions — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post your weekend positions

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-07 22:18 UTC

OP

Aptera makes up 50% of my degenfolio, and the other half is a leveraged 3x short on the airlines via JETD and a small 2x oil long via UCD.

None of you tards actually went long over the weekend did you. I was mildly concerned these idiots might make peace over the weekend, but of course they’re too stupid for that, so looks like Monday will print again.

Early replies (first 3)

61949703
Long oil futures. Leveraged CL exposure. Iran war about to make us rich. Trust the plan.

61949706
kek I bought $14k worth of Aptera at $2.20

might dump it come Monday, idk about the company’s future

61949707
Apterafag I thought you were a high roller but you only had a baby portfolio all along huh.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949720
Posted mine in another thread. If I sell at WTI ~$200, I’ll make over half a million dollars.

61949733
>>61949407
>leveraged 3x short on the airlines
unironically based

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 78 replies — 66.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-03-07 21:08 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61944611
>>61942268
This is a paid foreign operative btw

61944630
>>61942633
Checked, based, and redpilled.

61944680
>>61944611
I am American anon.

61944998
>>61942258
Inverse Cramer meme

61945056
>>61942181
Oil is at $91 and rising. This can only mean one thing: this special military operation will be clearly over in two weeks.

61945242
>>61944596
yeah trump and his family will be winning, but america won't be, this is afghanistan but even worse

61945267
Jim Cramer opposite rule, everything he says, the opposite is true

61945542
>If you get bombed and all your leaders killed, you win

such retarded logic

61945560
>>61945542
Worked for Vietnam and Afghanistan though.

61945575
>>61944540
That's what the elites want you to think. America is ruled by Christian Zionists and Frankists and they're motivated by their religious beliefs, not just profit. Here this Chinese lecture series should help:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lt8XLz78ZvY

61945631
>>61942181
>Supreme Leader killed
>all of his buddies are killed
>every time a new person steps up to run the show they get killed
>"This is how we win >:)"

Why are foreigners like this?

61945648
>>61945575
>Professor Jiang

Fucking kek. This is the same retard who claims that Hannibal Barca didn't exist. He just hates Western Culture and White people and wants to re-write Western history.

If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink). It's not hard to tell where the resentment comes from. Very common amongst asians btw.

You're either a paid shill, brown, asian, or very very fucking stupid to be pushing this astroturfed angry chink.

61946117
>>61942572
>Iran showed weakness,
Maybe, however I don't value that reading much. I wouldn't put it behind israel to act in this way though.

61946193
Just like Afghanistan.

61946198
>>61945631
Its a lot of TDS with extra stuff in between
I almost feel bad for the normies that get sucked into the propaganda stream. The world is much easier to read, ironically without the "news" telling you what is going on (what to think)

61946252
>>61945575
LOL i saw that video going around the other day. i need to sit down and watch it soon just for a laugh

61946276
>>61945575
Zionism is simply one head of the luciferian snake. There are many, and many are highly prominent in the world.
Don't confuse it with christianity just because they hide their disdain for the Creator most of the time

61946337
>>61946276
This

61946383
>>61942478
>They killed the leader, they rejects diplomatic offers which eliminated the possibility of iran creating a nuclear arsenal.
retard take, who the fuck told you that horseshit? and why are you dumb enough to believe them?

>>61942513
literally the only good thing about Iran is that they resisted the centraI banking carteI kikes tyranny, everything else about the government is awful, i want to call Iran Persia again, like the Iranian expats i occassionally speak to at my job who insist they're Persian, no Iranian.

61946430
>>61945648
>If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink).

i know a LOT of asians, some literally do get bullied for being gooks, usually by non-whites, but still, it scars them. Often them simply having a white friend, which is all some of them ever want, is enough to cure that entirely however.

>>61945242
its impossible for it to be worse than afghanistan, you either didn't live through it because you're a zoomer who failed school, or you're a retarded, lying shill.

>>61944680
so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free? thats even more pathetic anon, assuming you aren't lying. You're definitely turd-skinned though.

>>61943623
JlDF arriving quickly it seems, why arent you fighting on the frontlines Vile Schlomo? go on, your people want their greater lsraeI? go work for it.

>>61943610
its a real shame that all this anti-semitism that's popped up has once again completely missed this point huh?
>hurr jooz bad
>whats a central bank? i dunno
fucking npcs will never wake up.

61948084
>>61946430
>so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free?
I am white but I am a poorfag loser it's true. Not trying to astroturf anything, that's genuinely how I feel about it.

61948208
>>61943069
there are american ones too but their job isnt to shill, its to create conflict between us poors so that we dont eat the rich. all the tranny posting is by them.

61948661
>>61942181
Around 2011 Stefan Molyneux, libertarians and the tea party were saying the US Government was in $14 trillion of debt and there is no way the forever wars can continue. Look at us now.

https://odysee.com/@freedomain:b/another-imperial-quagmire-dr-ivan-eland:c

61948695
>>61943665
What an inane schizo rant. There is not a single indication for this to be true.

61948804
>>61942181
I voted for this

61948817
>>61943056
Germany declared war on the USA and not the other way around

61948937
>>61943665
>theories jewish psychologists invented, and retarded pseuds peddle to try and poison the well of Hitler-sentiment to keep the goys from waking up.
JlDF trannies are like broken records i swear, did they just replace you freaks with AI or something? hard to tell.

>>61948817
on paper they did, because the USA baited Japan, their ally, into attacking them, by blockading their cargo ships so they couldn't source crude oil. I could personally declare war against the USA right now from new zealand, but its as meaningless as when HitIer did.

>>61948661
alot of geopolitical and finance bros outside the normie sphere thought the same thing, but we were all blinded by one problem, every single US president and all the top officials were all controlled ped0s and puppets for globohomo. and on top of that, they were all retarded too.

But nobody realised HOW retarded and corrupt, because a relatively normal man with a good head for old-school economics, stepped in and simply copied what has worked in the past for the USA, and in his personal life. Its not a scenario that anyone could have predicted.

Trump is potentially solving the national debt by taxing the rest of the planet to do it. It'll probably work too, for awhile, until the rest of us go broke because of it. The central banking carteI designed this system to fail, not work for everyone.

61949034
used to browse 4chan all the time. old /pol/ etc yada who cares. fuck me this place looks dated. even if 99% of people here were working for some government agency or another - it's still just a rss feed for twitter which stopped mattering 8 years ago. who the fuck even bothers shilling on 4chan in 2028-2?

61949083
>>61943623
You are the midwit that believed your history teacher when he divided the class between non blond and blued eyed people vs everyone else and told that Hitler would kill everyone on the non blond/blue eyed side

61949561
>>61942633
Trump is a lot smarter than people give him credit for, and that is bad thing..
Don't get me wrong, i don't think there is any plan, most of it just seems to be throwing spaghetti at the wall and see what sticks.
..and "what sticks" - a desired outcome, seems to be either money (for him), elite loyalty, and/or creating prestige around his persona.
I think the war in Iran is about elite loyalty - money and prestige could certainly arise as an opportunity to be taken, but the main reason the US is at war with Iran is to cater to pro-Israel elite in the US.

item.title: AI BUBBLE IS POPPING — 99 replies — 39.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
AI BUBBLE IS POPPING

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-07 19:50 UTC

OP

It’s finally happening. THIS IS WHY NVDA DUMPED AFTER EARNINGS

Early replies (first 3)

61946639
two more weeks

61946643
>>61946600
@grok is this true?

61946647
priced out and off kirk af

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947901
>>61947160
>I pay $250 a month for Gemini Ultra

Which is still losing them money, they need over $1000 per user per month to break even.

61947909
>>61947633
>People already use it every day for all kinds of things - cooking, translating, asking for cost estimates, medical and legal questions, and so on and so on.

And how does this make money?

61947912
>>61947901
citation?
>>61947886
citation?
>>61947909
see >>61947160

61947952
>>61946763
>+35% productivity for junior level workers (i.e. interns, coops, and associate level work)
>+0% productivity for intermediate level workers
>-9% productivity for senior level workers that have to babysit dog shit LLMs and fix the hallucinations
Additionally
>in recent studies it's confirmed that AI is dog shit at IC work but is 5-10X more effective at middle management
So we make it harder for Zoomers to get entry level roles and eradicate the path to management for Millennials. Thereby sandbagging all of the younger generations, again. Older Millennials and younger GenX still take a productivity loss because the tools are so ass.

How does this help anyone?

61947977
>>61947644
>Anone whos in their 30s will use this and realize it basically gives you the same results as what google would give you 15 or so years ago before the internet became flooded with bullshit slop.

But you don’t realize how much more effective it is.
For some tax bullshit that used to drive you crazy researching as a self-employed person, ChatGPT now gives you the answer in a few seconds.

61947985
>>61946728
>Windows Xp/7 booted in 10 seconds
no it fucking didn't you lying nigger.

61948000
>>61947977
Deloitte already got pegged for advising on tax fraud because they used AI models thay gave incorrect information which fucked their clients. Don't use AI for taxes you retard. If actual "smart people" can't make it work then your normie ass definitely can't make it work.

61948008
>>61947952
Let me know when AI can create jobs.

61948009
>>61947952
Gutting career pathways provides shareholder value

61948011
>>61948000
I’m not talking about letting AI do your tax return (although that will probably be possible at some point too). I mean looking up specific rules. Five years ago I almost went crazy trying to figure out exactly how digital and physical sales to foreign private customers and businesses are supposed to be treated, and even my tax advisor couldn’t help me. It took forever to find the correct paragraphs (EU; it’s quite possible it’s much simpler in the US). And today ChatGPT immediately gives you the correct paragraph.

61948034
>>61946600
This is literally fake news from bloomberg. Cnbc report a half hour later confirmed the dc buildout is coming along just fine. Shit like this just underlines how eager everyone is for the bubble to pop (even the people actively betting on the ai buildout are bone-weary from the hype of it all), which is why we get these little clearing events every couple weeks off the slightest negative headline, before people realize it was a fugazi and the trillion dollar capex rollout is still, in fact, happening. But they're always glad to sell off everything in the hopes that it isn't any more.

We will continue to accelerate whether anyone likes it or not (spoiler: they will not, even if they make money off it).

61948041
>>61947565
>you're going to get steamrolled by a real lawyer
actually no. see pic related, plaintiffs attorney filed an emergency TRO and preliminary injunction. the court gave me less than 72 hours respond, even less when you consider the intentionally defective service. it would have been impossible for me to find a qualified attorney, vet them, get them to drop everything they're doing, review the 100 page packet I was served with, review hundreds of pages of my documents, secure declarations from third parties, one of which doesnt even own a car so they would have had to travel to them, and then write a 20 page memorandum in opposition with 50 pages of supporting exhibits to respond to this in time. the only way this problem could have been solved was with AI. anyways stay mad AI will make you obsolete

61948050
>>61946763
It's great for emails, as a Google Search Replacement or when I need a certain piece of advice for excel or a wifi manual.
It sucks ass with anything beyond that.
>Learn how to prompt
Doesn't stop it from hallucinating important data points. Might be fine for vibe coders at Clash of Clans, but not in financial analysis.

61948109
>>61948050
this accurately describes AI in 2023. get with the times, old man

61948182
>>61947647
>I'm so creative for telling le computer friend what to draw for me!!
Bleak

61948193
>>61947886
This kek, Internet is completely flooded with dogshit AI slop to stop other people from training anything worthwhile.

61948214
>>61948041
Can't wait until I have AI writing and interpreting laws and sentencing me with impunity sounds thrilling

61948251
>>61948214
It did a lot better than the plaintiff's attorney did, pic related

61948292
>>61947621
this is what its like to have no connection to reality, do you watch news or read articles, you need to step out of your echo chamber, have you seen what chatgpt 5.4 can do now?

61948299
>>61947733
During the dotcom bubble you didnt have an army of retards saying the bubble was about to pop.
I dont think you understand what bubbles mean. Have fun getting sidelined, cya at ATH

61948303
>>61948292
Can it write pro AI ads on 4chinz??

61948306
>>61948303
it can operate your desktop better than you can, so yes

61948311
>>61946677
@grok Call this guy a nigger

61948375
>>61948251
Holy based anon. Fuck those cunts

61948420
>>61948251
Give quick rundown of your legal problems and how this ended up, I'm curious now

61948982
>>61948420
>Give quick rundown of your legal problems and how this ended up, I'm curious now
i really shouldnt right now as i'll i've filed with the court so far is that memo in opposition and I really shouldnt be saying anything here which i havent yet said to the court. assuming people are still sperging about AI in a few weeks I should be able to

61949030
>>61948000
> If actual "smart people"
smart people hide in their parents basement, driven their by the vicious idiots who run things

61949154
>>61947647
lol anyone with normal pattern recognition can tell when something is made with AI. It's okay for a quick fap, but if you're trying to make a game with it then people won't want to buy it, at least not at the current prices. It's not a money printing machine.

61949225
>>61946691
Government contracts to astroturf their citizens with endless propaganda.

61949327
>>61947547
Or just wipe again the next time you do a #1. Sorry guys this means sitting down to pee.

>>61947021

61947059

The "if you didn't make it before 2025" guy was shitposting, but if you didn't buy bitcoin in 2011 and just hold without being a drug dealer or whatever you're boned forever and it will never get better. Welcome to the future.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947582
>>61947307
That's makes them honestly as dangerous as the mask off left variation of Germanies 1930s variation. Contrary to their post-1945 variations that to some degree understood that they are just grifters and scammers that for the most part just performed the dance of the true believer, the current batch has been grown on their own propaganda as a dogmatic truth and nourished into blind belief by grifters and opportunists. I don't think I am taking it too far when calling for a preemptive culling in the interest of the right that after nearly 80 years of Boomer and Silent retardations finds back to its roots and unironically yids that despite having been not been innocent in being part of the nourishing group are still their favorite scapegoat

61947584

61947585

61947604

61947605

61947606

61947611

61947639
>>61947611
What do you think creates the electricity you use, doofus ass?

61947665
>>61947582
I don't disagree
They've been fed a steady diet of reality distortion for so long they've been broken. Which also sounds harsh, but coming from academia, I was on the same path for a long time. The deprogramming takes a long time and leaves scars on the psyche that never really go away, especially after knowing what the big picture worldview is by these groups

61947674
>>61947390

61947713
>>61947665

Still some part of me believes that for deprogramming shattering the core orthodoxy of the national socialists not being right wing but an offshoot and logical end point off the lefts own totalitarian, eugenic and utopian instinct might be a non bloody way to get some to vomit in disgust at their own mirror image and renounce. Though simply taking the rabies dogs behind the shed is the more save and economic rational lane

61947717
>>61947021

61947726
>>61947021
I didn't vote for this but I wish I did

61947804

61947984
>>61947028
Ah yes, we're now at year 9 of "T-the walls are finally closing in on Trump. They'll arrest him any day now!"
Just two more weeks!

61948049
>>61947639

61948065
>>61947028
I want to see that fascist pig rot in jail so much it burns

61948121
>>61948065
You have a mental illness, kill yourself

61948129
>>61947585
Take your own advice migger, orange nigger is costing this board millions

61948142
>>61948121
How is the weather in Moscow?

61948165
>>61948121
Least psychotic Trump voter.

61948300
>>61947028
this the blue wave is going to be brutal and the democrats are going to investigate and impeach this piece of shit i hope hes prepared for 2 years of hell

61948614
>>61947021
The same thing happened in 2008 with oil. Meanwhiel we just got a headline nonfarm payroll that was negative and missed by 142,000, and multiple revisions, one which brought December 2025 to be negative, with more revisions coming, despite the gig economy massively masking the atrocious jobs market. They chose this time intentionally for Iran for a number of reasons (missile build, alongside dump of so much other disappointing admin action months before the midterms, in sequence of Venezuela before Cuba is added on etc.), not least of which financial. Credit (especially private) markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61948663
>>61948614
Bad economy is good for recruitment.

61948671
>>61947021

>????
>profit

61948936
>>61948614

61948973
>>61948300

61948979
>>61948065
Thats called gonorrhea, troon. Stop putting your jones in mens butts.

61949009
>>61947021
two more weeks

61949425
>>61949009
nothing ever happens. since vuvuzela is locked and since mid 2025 when the majority of demographic overhang of 50+ went into de-accumulation the trend for the next 80 year, optimistically, is clear and deterministic — down, nothing ever happens

item.title: The US has 10 days — 97 replies — 6.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 97 • Updated: 2026-03-07 06:33 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61940124
>>61938341

61940215
>>61940124
advanced money doctor

61940234
>>61938370
OP has been warned, he must evacuate his balls ASAP

61940472
>>61938341
This special combat operation will be over in 2 weeks, just like Ukraine

61940500
>>61939974
>only Republicans voted for war
Remember the reaction from Democrats when Trump pulled troops out of Syria?

61940570
>>61938402

A "launcher" can be made from about 3 scaffolding poles and a bungee cord. Iran has or had 80,000 drones. Trump dun goofed here when Israel tricked him into this.

61941344
>>61938341
How is Lutnick making money off this?

61941358
>>61938399
We'll explode the nuklear just like in the bibble.

61941381
>>61941358
>Middle Eastern Christians
I don't get why people bring up a nearly non-existent group. 99% of them convered to Islam either by choice or by force over the last 1,400 years.

61941414
>>61938341
So in two weeks?

61941712
>>61941381
>over the last 25 years*
Ftfy

61942683
>>61938601
Ships have been transiting the strait by the simple expedient of turning off their transponders.

61942707
I don't mind if Israel and the US want to be retarded in their own little sandboxes, but why do they have to drag the rest of the world into it

61942764
>>61938506
The only thing that matters is that the US is the first to achieve AGI. >>61938487
Is on to something here. This move, which seems to be such a blunder, is the only thing that can set China and the EU back enough for the US to win the AI race.

61942831
>>61938341
>The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz
No.
>or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)
Nobody cares.
> on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day.
Ok, sot there's 1/4 of all oil that isn't getting to EU and UK.
So, oil price will go up.
>Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW
It'll be $100 - 150 .
I guess EU and UK should have not sanctioned Russia, tough luck now.

61942837
>>61938345
Wholly retard.
Trump made US oil independent during first term, and US is top 3 oil producing country now.
Oil price going up means US gov will have more money to balance the budget.

61942844
>>61942831

BOND YIELDS will crash the economy, not oil itself. With a structural 15m daily barrel deficit oil will go up every week. The only way to destroy demand is recession, oil will go up until it reaches the breaking point for global growth and blows everything up.

There is no feelings or opinions to this. Shutting the strait is a 15m barrel deficit. Ask any energy expert that that does to prices. It’s 150-200

61942850
>>61942837

Has nothing to do with US energy production because crude is a global market. Just ask yourself what would happen if the 30 year yield went to 7%. That’s a 30-45% dump in equities

61942851
>>61942837
I'm sure Joe Shcmo on the street is going to be happy paying 2 dollars a litre to fund Israel. Do you NEET retards really live in such a vacuum?

61942854
Crypto will pump. The thesis for crypto has always been based on the collapse of the system

61942897
>>61942854
Crypto is fiat with extra steps
No fiat, no crypto

61944577
One week in so far. WTI: 65-90
If this continue another week we will see 125 WTI and markets down 5%

61944640
>>61938341
>What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.
So the XRP domino theory is playing out?
Bullish for XRP?

61945025
>>61938402
>Anything bigger than that is already dead
It was literally yesterday that Iran launched a Khoramshahr-4, the biggest missile in their arsenal, at Tel Aviv

61945048
>>61942837
The US oil sector is small compared to the rest of the US economy. It is privately owned, so the bulk of profits go to private shareholders, not the government.

61945281
>>61938425
If you are good at reading body language you can see when they are together Bibi has nothing but contempt for Trump, it is because bibi has seen all the VHS tapes, he knows he owns his ass and treats him like a dog to do his bidding

61945399
>>61939987

61945481
This Is the end.
Bye bye USA.
Bye bye israHell

61945896
>>61938341

61948489
>>61945481

item.title: OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO — 13 replies — 6.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-07 20:12 UTC

OP

OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Early replies (first 3)

61949117
I used to check how BTC was behaving by browsing the catalog for a few seconds and see if there was pink or green wojak threads. To me this was a way more comfy way than checking coinmarketcap or tradingview.
But suddenly you started doing these threads at seemengly random times since a few months ago.
You must be doing this just to personally target me and fuck with my comfyness. I just want you to know that if that was your intention, you won.

61949120
>>61949051
Wait. This one is not a joke post?!
We are finally MOONING. Fuck you, bears

61949151
>>61949117
Lowkey pinkjak post

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949173
>>61949117
It’s the newfag zoomers who are basically Reddit incarnate. Not a big fan of this generation.

61949188
>>61949117
the purpose of 4chan has always been to jerk people around emotionally

61949194
>>61949051

61949196
>>61949173
>trolling is reddit newfag now

61949247
If you are in Dubai you can buy discounted gold.

61949297
>>61949194
she cute

61949337
Jane Street primed to hard sell at 10AM Monday yet again? Rinse and repeat.

61949353
>>61949196
It’s a gay trolling method. Low effort. Low iq.

61949361
>>61949353
just say you fell for it

61949418
>>61949361
Fell for what? Checking coin gecko again? Who gives a crap? I already check coin gecko every two minutes every day.
